title: mentha arvensis var. sativa
intro: Mentha arvensis var. sativa, also known as wild spearmint or American wild mint, is a plant species within the mint family that is native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis var. sativa include its ability to ease nausea and vomiting, improve digestion, and provide relief from headaches and joint pain. Mentha arvensis var. sativa can be consumed in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
